series_metadata.series_description: The Departmental Policies and Procedures are the rules and regulations that are created by the BWC Administration or the Departments (e.g. Finance, Human Resources, Medical Services, Special Investigations, Operational Policy, and Vocational Rehabilitation) that may have confidential/sensitive information for employees to follow while being employed at BWC.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: these records five years, and ; Paper: these records five years, and
